---
title: "Quoted in the *Vancouver Sun* on crowdfunding and tragedy response"
date: "2026-03-28"
categories: [media]
outlet: "Vancouver Sun"
outlet_url: "https://vancouversun.com/news/gofundme-has-changed-the-way-many-british-columbians-donate-to-causes"
---

I was quoted in Glenda Luymes's article, ["People 'want to help': GoFundMe has changed the way many British Columbians donate to causes"](https://vancouversun.com/news/gofundme-has-changed-the-way-many-british-columbians-donate-to-causes), in the *Vancouver Sun*, on GoFundMe use in B.C. to respond to tragedies like the Tumbler Ridge shooting, drawing on findings from my book [*GoFailMe*](/book/) (Stanford University Press), about how networks and algorithmic visibility shape who gets funded.
